message:
Fix clippy errors, test failures, and truncate_tail suffix invariant bug

- Fix 15 clippy errors across bedrock.rs, auth.rs, error.rs, provider_metadata.rs
- Fix provider_backward_lock.rs: remove unused imports, 12 needless borrows
- Fix provider_native_verify.rs: option_if_let_else, redundant clones
- Fix provider_metadata_comprehensive.rs: too_many_lines, usize cast
- Fix interactive.rs: too_many_lines allow attribute
- Fix truncate_tail() bug: partial byte truncation excluded trailing newlines,
  breaking the suffix invariant (input must end with result content)
- Update vertex provider env key tests for new VERTEX_API_KEY alias

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
